message:
feat(status): add context usage and token count to AgentStatus

Extends AgentStatus struct with fields to expose context window usage
metrics, enabling dashboards and monitoring tools to display token
consumption per agent.

New fields:
- ContextUsage: estimated context usage percentage (0-100)
- TokensUsed: estimated token count

Both fields use omitempty to avoid cluttering JSON output when values
are not available or not yet computed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
